caption: Chris, quick heads up — Thursday rehearsal, can we push to 6:30? Studio A's booked till 6.
Yeah 6:30 works. Is Patricia still coming to observe?
No, she moved it to next week. Just us and the corps.
Good. I want to run the Act II transitions again, they're sloppy on the left side.
Agreed. Sophie especially. You want to pull her aside beforehand?
Yeah, 10 min before the others arrive. Keep it low-key.
Done. I'll confirm the Parkside studio with front desk and send a reminder to the group.
Perfect. See you Thursday.

Studio A this morning -- the corps finally held the arabesque line through the lighting shift.
Emily's first real variation. Proud doesn't cover it.
Callowhill Market Saturday haul. Sunday dinner planning starts here.
Reformer at 6:30, then classes till one. Dancer's discipline.
Bernstein section is finally singing. One more pass tomorrow.
Winter showcase rehearsal underway. Mid-December at the Academy Theater.
Bloch and Capezio restock day. The corps goes through shoes.
Sunday roast with the family. Barbara brought dessert.
The Schuylkill this morning while Sarah ran. Good light.
Liberty City Ballet last night. Season subscription is worth every minute.
Chopin nocturnes and Diptyque Baies -- evening reading ritual.
Costume references from Lisa Thompson's latest -- the detailing is extraordinary.
Backstage at the Academy Theater before tech.
Copland on the speakers, Wednesday choreography time. Protected hours.
